lessons.title: Mana Foundation
lessons.description: Learn the fundamentals of Red Mage's dual mana system and how to maintain balance for optimal damage.
keyPoints: Black Mana: Generated by Verthunder III (+6), Verfire (+5), and dark magic
White Mana: Generated by Veraero III (+6), Verstone (+5), and light magic
Keep mana within 30 of each other for optimal finisher potency
Imbalanced mana (>30 diff) reduces finisher damage significantly
tips: Watch your mana gauge constantly - balance is key to RDM damage
If one mana is high, prioritize casting the opposite element

lessons.title: Dualcast Mastery
lessons.description: Master the Dualcast system - Red Mage's signature mechanic that makes every other spell instant.
keyPoints: Dualcast: Any hardcast (2.5s+) grants Dualcast buff for 15s
Dualcast makes your next spell instant - use for long casts like Verthunder/Veraero
Standard pattern: Hardcast (Jolt/Verfire/Verstone) -> Instant (Verthunder/Veraero)
Swiftcast provides emergency instant when Dualcast isn't available
tips: Never let Dualcast expire - always have a long spell ready
ABC: Always Be Casting - minimize GCD downtime

lessons.title: Proc Management
lessons.description: Understand how to manage Verfire Ready and Verstone Ready procs for optimal mana generation and DPS.
keyPoints: Verthunder III/Veraero III have ~50% chance to grant opposite proc
Procs last 30s - use expiring procs (<5s) before they fall off
When not expiring, use procs to balance mana (low side gets priority)
Acceleration guarantees proc from next Verthunder/Veraero (2 charges, 55s CD)
tips: Track proc timers - losing a proc is a DPS loss
Use Acceleration when you need a guaranteed proc or for burst windows

lessons.title: Melee Combo Fundamentals
lessons.description: Learn when to enter the melee combo and how to execute it properly without dropping combo or wasting mana.
keyPoints: Enter melee combo at 50|50 mana minimum (both Black and White)
Combo: Enchanted Riposte (20|20) -> Zwerchhau (15|15) -> Redoublement (15|15)
Combo timer is 30s - complete the full sequence or lose progress
Don't overcap mana (>90) - enter combo to spend before capping
tips: Plan your combo timing around mechanics - don't start if you'll be forced off boss
Melee combo hits are instant - great for movement phases

lessons.title: Finisher System
lessons.description: Master the finisher sequence after melee combo - Verflare/Verholy, Scorch, Resolution, and Grand Impact.
keyPoints: After Redoublement: Use Verflare (if Black <= White) or Verholy (if White < Black)
Chosen finisher guarantees opposite proc (Verflare -> Verfire Ready)
Scorch follows Verflare/Verholy (Lv.80), Resolution follows Scorch (Lv.90)
Grand Impact (Lv.96) follows Resolution - completes the finisher chain
tips: Finisher selection auto-corrects mana imbalance - pick the lower side
All finishers are instant - use for movement if needed

lessons.title: Burst Windows
lessons.description: Optimize your burst with Embolden timing, Manafication usage, and oGCD weaving for maximum damage.
keyPoints: Embolden: 5% party magic damage for 20s (120s CD) - align with party buffs
Manafication: Doubles mana (cap 50|50), enables immediate melee combo
Enter melee combo during burst windows for maximum damage output
Fleche (25s), Contre Sixte (35s) - use on cooldown, weave between GCDs
tips: Hold Manafication briefly if party buffs are coming in ~5s
Don't clip GCDs when weaving - one oGCD per GCD window is safe

lessons.title: Advanced Optimization
lessons.description: Final lesson: movement optimization, gap closers, AoE rotation, and putting it all together for high-level play.
keyPoints: Corps-a-corps: Gap closer (2 charges) - use to get into melee range
Engagement/Displacement: Melee oGCDs - weave during combo
AoE rotation at 3+ targets: Veraero II/Verthunder II, Impact, Enchanted Moulinet
Movement priority: Dualcast instants > Procs > Swiftcast > melee combo
tips: Pre-plan Manafication timing for fight phases and downtime
RDM has excellent mobility - use Dualcast and melee combo for movement
